name: love-hurts-enchanted-rose-cathedral
founder_lock_quote: Love Hurts should be Beauty and the beast inspired with the enchanted rose as a focal point
scene_description: Photorealistic cinematic Beauty and the Beast inspired scene — Cocteau intensity, NOT Disney polish. Shadowed gothic cathedral interior at night, vast vaulted stone arches receding into darkness, ribbed stone columns disappearing into deep shadow on both sides. Center-foreground: ornate stone pedestal carved with intertwined thorns and roses, holding a tall hand-blown glass dome containing a single perfect deep-red enchanted rose — lit from within by an ethereal warm-amber glow, the rose is the only fully-lit object in the entire frame, the spotlight of the scene. Faint glow halo emanates from the dome into the surrounding shadow. A single shaft of deep crimson light pours through a high stained-glass rose window in the upper-right of the frame, dust motes drifting in the beam. Crimson velvet curtains line the stone columns, receding into deep shadow at the edges. Scattered deep-red rose petals on the polished dark stone floor around the pedestal base, some petals slightly wilted as if from the rose's slow magic. Wrought-iron candelabra in the mid-background hold lit candles casting small pools of amber warmth. The polished dark stone floor reflects the rose's ethereal glow as a soft crimson smear.

color_palette.highlight: ethereal warm-amber glow from inside dome + candle amber
color_palette.petals: deep blood-red scattered, some wilted purple-edge

lighting.fill_light: stained-glass rose window shaft (deep crimson directional)
lighting.exposure_mood: Cocteau Beauty/Beast intensity — fairy-tale gothic, NOT Disney polish
lighting.shadows: deep, vast, swallowing edges of frame; rose dome reverses shadow only at its glow halo

camera.perspective: interior gothic cathedral nave, looking down central aisle toward pedestal
camera.angle: slight upward hero angle on rose pedestal so dome reads monumental
camera.lens_mood: 85mm cinematic, shallow depth, dome in razor-sharp focus, columns softly receding
depth_cues: vaulted arches + candelabra far background (deep shadow)
stained-glass rose window upper-right (dramatic shaft of light)
camera.composition: 3:4 portrait, vertical stone columns + arches frame the centered rose dome
camera.atmospheric_fog: incense haze in shafts of stained-glass light, dust motes in candle pools

skyyrose_dna: LH canon: Hurts is the bloodline that raised me. Three generations of Hurts. The rose under glass — protected, fragile, kept. Beauty and the Beast cadence — Cocteau intensity, NOT Disney polish. The Beast didn't hide from ugliness, he hid because he loved something fragile.

focal_anchor.object: single perfect deep-red enchanted rose under tall hand-blown glass dome
focal_anchor.position: center-foreground, on ornate stone pedestal carved with thorns and roses
focal_anchor.detail: lit from within by ethereal warm-amber glow, the only fully-lit object in the frame, faint glow halo into surrounding shadow
focal_anchor.rationale: LH canon — the rose under glass is the entire visual thesis, protected fragile kept

product_staging_zones.fit: draped over a smaller adjacent stone pedestal or carved wooden stand, receding into shadow
product_staging_zones.lighting_match_directive: let product receive amber candelabra rim light + reflected crimson glow from rose dome; do NOT overpower the rose

product_staging_zones.fit: draped over candelabra arm or stone ledge, in candle-amber pool
laid flat on polished stone floor among scattered petals, near pedestal base
hung from wrought-iron candelabra against column, deep shadow

negative_prompts: no people, no human figures, no silhouettes
NO Disney polish, NO Disney rose, NO Disney palette saturation
no daylight, no outdoor scene, no exterior
no products outshining the rose under glass (rose is the spotlight)
no faces in stained glass (abstract patterns only)
reference_brands: Jean Cocteau La Belle et la Bête (1946) — cinematography reference

atmospheric.mood: enchanted, fragile, kept, sacred, the rose holds the lair together
atmospheric.sound_implied: single candle wick crackling, distant wind through stained glass, silence between
